praise: EV station charging capability via adapter
Crisp, informative LCD and stable app connection
Robust physical build with integrated wheels
Seamless integration with EcoFlow Smart Home Panel
friction: Considerable fan noise during high-speed charging
Solar input voltage limit of 150V requires careful panel wiring
Proprietary expansion battery connector cables are stiff
Some reports of Bluetooth connectivity drops in early firmware
delta_summary: Firmware v1.0.1.72 significantly optimized fan curves for low loads
Recent app updates added granular discharge limit controls
